name: loopy
description: A small skill system for turning unstable work into tested survivors.

interface.shortDescription: Turn unstable work into tested survivors
interface.longDescription: Use Loopy to refine claims, theory, process rules, and design principles through rejection tests until the smallest stable survivor remains.
defaultPrompt: Use loopy:loopy-theory to refine this claim.
Use loopy:loopy-theory to test this theory.
Use loopy:loopy-theory to improve this process rule.
